description: Create webhook_master.py - a Python3 stdlib-only HTTP server that replaces the long-polling tg_master.sh with a webhook-driven architecture. Listens on port 7860, handles POST /webhook (Telegram updates), POST /heartbeat (Agent keepalive), and GET /health (HF Spaces health check). Implements ALL existing TG command handlers from tg_master.sh.
steps: Create master/webhook_master.py with imports: http.server, json, sqlite3, hmac, hashlib, urllib.request, urllib.parse, os, time, base64, threading, re, socket
Implement ThreadedHTTPServer class (ThreadingMixIn + HTTPServer) listening on 0.0.0.0:7860
Implement GET /health endpoint returning 200 OK with JSON {status: ok}
Implement POST /webhook endpoint that parses Telegram Update JSON, extracts message/callback_query, and routes to handler functions
Implement POST /heartbeat endpoint that validates HMAC-SHA256 signature (using sender's chat_id as key), updates node last_seen and stores system status in DB

Implement SQLite database initialization matching existing schema: nodes table (chat_id, node_name, agent_ip, agent_port, last_seen, region, node_alias, enable_google, enable_trust, enable_ota) with PRIMARY KEY(chat_id, node_name), and ip_trend_log table (id, node_name, check_time, scam_score, goog_status, nf_status, gpt_status). Enable WAL mode.

Implement generate_signed_url(target_ip, target_port, action_path, chat_id) using HMAC-SHA256 with chat_id as PSK, matching the exact logic in tg_master.sh: payload='{action_path}:{timestamp}', signature = hmac(chat_id, payload, sha256). Returns 'https://{ip}:{port}{path}?t={timestamp}&sign={signature}'

Implement send_ui(chat_id, text, inline_keyboard_json), send_msg(chat_id, text), edit_msg(chat_id, message_id, text), edit_ui(chat_id, message_id, text, inline_keyboard_json) helper functions using urllib.request to call Telegram Bot API
Implement get_flag(region_code) function matching the exact flag mapping in tg_master.sh

Implement handle_register(chat_id, text) for #REGISTER# messages - parse '|' delimited fields (region, node_name, ip, port, alias, ota), validate inputs (SSRF check for private IPs), UPSERT into nodes table, send confirmation with region radar UI
Implement handle_start_menu(chat_id) for /start and /menu commands - check remote version, build inline keyboard with radar/patrol/reports/OTA buttons, show node count
Implement handle_list_nodes(chat_id, msg_id=None) for 'list_nodes' callback - query regions grouped by count, build region buttons
Implement handle_region(chat_id, region_code, msg_id=None) for 'region:XX' callback - list nodes in that region with manage buttons

Implement handle_manage(chat_id, node_name, msg_id=None) for 'manage:NODE' callback - show node control panel with all action buttons (trigger google/trust/quality/report/log, toggle modules, rename, OTA, delete)

Implement handle_action(chat_id, action_type, target_node, msg_id=None) for 'google:NODE', 'trust:NODE', 'run:NODE', 'report:NODE', 'log:NODE', 'quality:NODE' callbacks - lookup agent IP/port from DB, generate signed URL, send curl request to agent, report result

Implement handle_toggle(chat_id, mod_name, target_node, target_state, msg_id) for 'toggle:MOD:NODE:STATE' callback - send signed request to agent /trigger_toggle with mod and state params, update DB, refresh manage panel
Implement handle_rename_prompt(chat_id, target_node) for 'rename:NODE' callback - send force_reply message asking for new alias
Implement handle_do_rename(chat_id, target_node, new_alias) for rename reply processing - send signed request to agent /trigger_rename with base64-encoded alias, update DB
Implement handle_delete(chat_id, target_node, msg_id=None) for 'del:NODE' callback - verify ownership, delete from nodes and ip_trend_log, refresh region radar
Implement handle_all_run(chat_id) for 'all_run' callback - iterate all nodes, send signed /trigger_run to each
Implement handle_all_reports(chat_id) for 'all_reports' callback - iterate all nodes, send signed /trigger_report to each with 2s delay
Implement handle_all_ota_confirm/execute(chat_id, msg_id) for 'all_ota_confirm'/'all_ota_execute' callbacks - show warning, then iterate OTA-enabled nodes and send /trigger_ota
Implement handle_master_ota_confirm/execute(chat_id, msg_id) for 'master_ota_confirm'/'master_ota_execute' callbacks - self-upgrade logic
Implement handle_ota_confirm/execute(chat_id, target_node, msg_id) for 'ota_confirm:NODE'/'ota_execute:NODE' - single node OTA
Implement handle_svq(chat_id, text, cb_id, msg_id) for deep-sea sonar data ingestion (svq|node|score|goog|nf|gpt format) - insert into ip_trend_log
Implement handle_trend(chat_id, target_node, msg_id=None) for 'trend:NODE' and '/trend NODE' - query ip_trend_log last 15 records, format table
Implement handle_quality_cmd(chat_id, text) for '/quality NODE' text command
Implement handle_reply_rename(chat_id, reply_to_text, text) for detecting rename reply messages (checking for the marker text in reply_to_message)
Implement DB auto-migration logic (ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN with try/except for already-exists) matching tg_master.sh's self-healing schema

Implement main() function: load config from environment variables (TG_TOKEN, DB_FILE, MASTER_DIR, MASTER_VERSION, IS_OFFICIAL_GATEWAY, ENABLE_MASTER_OTA, WEBHOOK_URL), initialize DB, start server on port 7860
Add __name__ == '__main__' guard calling main()

Use subprocess.Popen for curl calls to agents (non-blocking) rather than urllib (since agents use self-signed TLS certs that urllib would reject). Match existing pattern of 'curl -k -s --connect-timeout 5 -m 15 URL'.
Implement answer_callback_query(cb_id, text=None, show_alert=False) helper to clear loading spinner on inline button presses
acceptance_criteria: master/webhook_master.py exists and passes Python3 AST parsing without errors

All TG command handlers from tg_master.sh are implemented: /start, /menu, /quality, /trend, list_nodes, region:*, manage:*, google:*, trust:*, run:*, report:*, log:*, quality:*, toggle:*, del:*, rename:*, do_rename:*, ota_confirm:*, ota_execute:*, all_run, all_reports, all_ota_confirm, all_ota_execute, master_ota_confirm, master_ota_execute, svq|*, #REGISTER#, trend:*
POST /heartbeat endpoint validates HMAC signature and updates node last_seen
Only Python3 standard library modules are used (no pip packages)
generate_signed_url produces URLs matching the format used by agent_daemon.sh HMAC validation
SQLite schema matches existing tg_master.sh schema including WAL mode
verification: Run: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); exec(compile(open('master/webhook_master.py').read(), 'webhook_master.py', 'exec'))" with a timeout to verify it at least starts (will fail on missing env vars but should not have import errors)
Grep for all handler implementations to confirm completeness
